---
name: Question
about: Ask about local setup, Appwrite/Redis, contributing, or how something works in this repo
title: "[Question] "
labels: ""
assignees: sadanandpai
---

#### What is your question?

A clear, specific question (one main topic per issue helps).

#### What are you trying to accomplish?

Example: run the app locally, add a challenge, understand a server action, etc.

#### What have you tried?

Commands you ran, config you changed, and the outcome (paste errors if any).

#### Environment (if relevant)

- OS:
- Node version (`node -v`):
- Browser (if UI-related):

#### Anything else?

Links to docs you already read, screenshots, etc.
